raw_title: Claims of Victimhood Shield Politicians from Political Scandals
title_en: Claims of Victimhood Shield Politicians from Political Scandals
title_zh: 受害声明保护政治家免受政治丑闻影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨政治家如何通过声称自己是受害者来减少政治丑闻对他们的负面影响。研究发现，当政治家把自己描绘成受害者时，公众可能更同情他们，从而减轻丑闻带来的损害。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how politicians can reduce the negative impact of political scandals by claiming victimhood. The study finds that when politicians portray themselves as victims, the public may feel more sympathetic toward them, thereby mitigating the damage from scandals.
research_direction_zh: 探索政治传播中情感策略的有效性，特别是受害声明如何影响公众对政治丑闻的反应和评价。
research_direction_en: Investigating the effectiveness of emotional strategies in political communication, specifically how claims of victimhood influence public responses to and evaluations of political scandals.
